mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.sort ASC
SELECT rp.permission_id FROM sys_role_permission rp INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0
